---
title: "Internship"
---

Thank you for visiting my Internship page. The purpose of this page aims at providing employers a review and highlight of all my internship that I have experience since starting my Computer Engineering Degree at the University of Guelph, starting from my first internship from the City of Calgary after my first-year. Each one of these interns.

## City of Calgary Supply & Project Management Intern
**Internship Period** 

Start Date: May 2024

End Date: August 2024

### Overview and Experience

####  Projects Management Skills

#### Technical & Programming Skills

#### Soft and Technical Skill Development

#### Leaderships Skills
